access_types.name: Map_Function_Access
access_types.code:
type Map_Function_Access is access function (Key : Character)
                                            return String;

documentation.description: Map from Key into String. Map must be stable.

documentation.description:
Translate Source with Breek/Key replaced by Map.
Map must be stable.
